_comment: Pinned compatible versions of upstream tools that `wp setup --bundle` installs. Each agent-kit release runs the bundle smoke CI (Blueprint Task 3.3) against the pinned versions before declaring the agent-kit version stable. Renovate-bot watches upstream releases and proposes pin bumps; agent-kit maintainer merges after smoke CI passes against the new range.

rtk._comment: Rust Token Killer (https://github.com/reachingforthejack/rtk-rust). Distributed as a binary; install via `brew install rtk` on macOS or `cargo install rtk` cross-platform.
rtk._range_note: TBD when v1.0 alpha builds out: set to the rtk version verified by smoke CI against agent-kit's hook chain.

_intentionally_not_pinned.gstack: Curated Webpresso-owned Markdown skills are staged from private workspace package @repo/gstack. Upstream gstack is not consumed at HEAD; refreshes are explicit manual blueprint work with provenance review.
